scripts.test: bun run test:frontend && bun run test:rust
scripts.test:frontend: bun run --cwd packages/core vitest run && bun run --cwd packages/settings vitest run && bun run --cwd packages/editor vitest run && bun run --cwd packages/renderer vitest run && bun run --cwd packages/plugin-runtime vitest run && bun run --cwd packages/marketplace vitest run && bun run --cwd packages/theme-mobile vitest run && bun run --cwd apps/desktop vitest run
scripts.benchmark:editor: bun run --cwd packages/editor vitest bench src/__benchmarks__/livePreview.bench.ts
scripts.benchmark:file-explorer: bun run --cwd apps/desktop vitest bench src/__benchmarks__/fileTree.bench.ts
scripts.test:coverage: bun run --cwd packages/core vitest run --coverage && bun run --cwd packages/settings vitest run --coverage && bun run --cwd packages/editor vitest run --coverage && bun run --cwd packages/renderer vitest run --coverage && bun run --cwd packages/plugin-runtime vitest run --coverage && bun run --cwd packages/marketplace vitest run --coverage && bun run --cwd apps/desktop vitest run --coverage
